title: Harris Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Paint Brush, 2in
features: Suitable for Solvent, water-based paints & varnishes
For use on Doors, skirting boards & window frames
For use when painting flat sections of wooden trim, such as skirting boards, stair banisters, doors and door architraves.
For use with all gloss, eggshell and satin paints.
description: This paint brush has been specifically designed and engineered to give you seriously good results when painting woodwork with all gloss, eggshell and satin paints. After painting with oil based paints such as gloss, satin and eggshell. These paints require specialised cleaners, please refer to the paint tin for further guidance. *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or if left in a damp area. Suitable for Solvent, water-based paints & varnishes For use on Doors, skirting boards & window frames Comfort handle Not resistant to rust Instructions for Care - After painting with oil based paints such as gloss, satin and eggshell. These paints require specialised cleaners, please refer to the paint tin for further guidance. *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or if left in a damp area. Features and benefits For use with all gloss, eggshell and satin paints. Guaranteed No Bristle Loss*. For use when painting flat sections of wooden trim, such as skirting boards, stair banisters, doors and door architraves.
